name: pitwall-server
description: PITWALL backend scaffold - Postgres-capable sync API for Race Team Software

scripts.start: mkdir -p /tmp/aim && curl -fsSL https://github.com/bmc-labs/xdrk/raw/trunk/aim/libxdrk-x86_64.so -o /tmp/aim/libxdrk-x86_64.so || true; export LD_PRELOAD=$(ldconfig -p 2>/dev/null | grep 'libxml2\.so\.2' | awk '{print $NF}' | head -1); node run-migrations.js && node index.js
